debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hf : IsIso f
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f ∧ @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f

proof:
rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
  constructor
  · intros W h k H; rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, H, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k H; rw [← id_comp h, ← hgf, assoc, H, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp]
failed_attempts: exact ⟨section_mono f hf.inv hf.inv_hom_id, retraction_epi f hf.inv hf.hom_inv_id⟩

let ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
  constructor
  · intros W h k H; rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hfg, assoc, H, ← assoc]
  · intros Z h k H; rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hgf, ← assoc, H, assoc]

constructor
  · intros W h k H
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, H, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k H
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, H, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq; rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc]
  · intros Z h k h_eq; rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc]
⟨section_mono f hf.inv hf.inv_hom_id, retraction_epi f hf.inv hf.hom_inv_id⟩

constructor
  · intros W h k heq; rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, heq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k heq; rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, heq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc]

constructor
  · intros W h k hh
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, hh, assoc]
  · intros Z h k hh
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, hh, ← assoc]

simp [← assoc, H, h1, h2]
  · intros Z h k H; rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k]; simp [assoc, H, h1, h2]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros h k hh
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, hh, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros h k hh
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, hh, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k H
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, H, assoc]
  · intros Z h k H
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, H, ← assoc]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]
exact ⟨section_mono f hf.inv hf.inv_hom_id, retraction_epi f hf.inv hf.hom_inv_id⟩

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k H
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, H, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k H
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, H, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k heq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, heq, assoc]
  · intros Z h k heq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, heq, ← assoc]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq]

constructor
  · intros h k w
    rw [← comp_id, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, w, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros h k w
    rw [← id_comp, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, w, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k H
    rw [← comp_id, ← comp_id, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, H, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k H
    rw [← id_comp, ← id_comp, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, H, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k H; rw [← comp_id h, ← hf.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, H, assoc, hf.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k H; rw [← id_comp h, ← hf.inv_hom_id, assoc, H, ← assoc, hf.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k hh
    exact (((iso_equiv f).out 0 1).mp hf W).1 hh
  · intros Z h k hh
    exact (((iso_equiv f).out 0 2).mp hf Z).1 hh
successful_attempts:
rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
  constructor
  · intros W h k H; rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, H, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k H; rw [← id_comp h, ← hgf, assoc, H, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k hhk
    obtain ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, hhk, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k hhk
    obtain ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hgf, assoc, hhk, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, ghf⟩
  constructor
  · intros W h k H
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, H, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k H
    rw [← id_comp h, ← ghf, assoc, H, ← assoc, ghf, id_comp]

constructor
  · intros W h k heq
    let ⟨g, hfg, ghf⟩ := hf
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, heq, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k heq
    let ⟨g, hfg, ghf⟩ := hf
    rw [← id_comp h, ← ghf, assoc, heq, ← assoc, ghf, id_comp]

obtain ⟨g, h1, h2⟩ := hf
  constructor
  · intros W h k H; rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← h1, ← assoc, H, assoc]
  · intros Z h k H; rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← h2, assoc, H, ← assoc]
